# Owner's Manual (generated by Stewie Reflect)

This is the evidence-bounded Owner's Manual for this repository, generated by
[Stewie Reflect](https://reflect.stewie.sh) from a read-only snapshot at commit `c5cd06f`.
It is a static, as-written analysis of the operator CLI — what it does, where trust
comes from, and where the evidence ends.

- **`manual.md`** — the full manual (6 chapters).
- **`figures/*.mmd`** — diagrams as Mermaid source (render on GitHub / mermaid.live; each
  is also described in prose inline in `manual.md`).

Worth noting as a check on this repo's honesty: Reflect **independently surfaced the same
governance limitations listed in the root [README](../README.md#known-limitations--help-wanted)**
— the honor-system `verified_by`, the durability/tamper gap, and the provenance fragility —
from the code alone. An outside, evidence-bounded reader reaching the same conclusions is the
point of keeping it here.

Generated by Stewie Reflect; included with attribution.
